items.q: Name the movie that features the character Forrest Gump.
items.explanation: Forrest Gump is strongly linked to Forrest Gump.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Frozen?
items.explanation: Elsa is one of the defining characters in Frozen.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Woody.
items.explanation: Woody is strongly linked to Toy Story.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Belle.
items.explanation: Belle is strongly linked to Beauty and the Beast.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Black Panther?
items.explanation: T'Challa is one of the defining characters in Black Panther.

items.q: The character Chief Brody appears in Toy Story.
items.explanation: Chief Brody appears in Jaws, not Toy Story.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Ethan Hunt.
items.explanation: Ethan Hunt is strongly linked to Mission: Impossible - Fallout.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Deadpool?
items.explanation: Deadpool is one of the defining characters in Deadpool.

items.q: Which movie features the character Diana Prince?
items.explanation: Diana Prince is associated with Wonder Woman.

items.q: The character Shrek appears in Shrek.
items.explanation: Shrek is a key character in Shrek.
